nodes.summary: Plain-backed sparrow（Passer flaveolus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Plain-backed sparrow。

nodes.name: Passer
nodes.summary: Passer（Passer）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联28种鸟类，如灰頭麻雀、Swainson's sparrow、Parrot-billed sparrow等28种鸟类。

nodes.name: Plain-backed sparrow
nodes.summary: The plain-backed sparrow (Passer flaveolus), also called the Pegu sparrow or olive-backed sparrow, is a sparrow found in Southeast Asia. Its range spans from Myanmar to central Vietnam, and south to the western part of Peninsular Malaysia. References Works cited Giebel, C. G. (1877). Thesaurus Ornithologiae (in German). Vol. III. Brockhaus. Summers-Smith, J. Denis (1988). The Sparrows: a Study of the Genus Passer. illustrated by Robert Gillmor. Calton, Staffs, England: T. & A. D. Poyser. ISBN 978-0-85661-048-6. External links Pegu sparrow at the Internet Bird Collection
